prompt: Create a dramatic vertical anime-style fashion illustration of an elegant adult woman standing on a nighttime subway platform, with her face intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular gray blur for anonymity. She has glossy black wavy bob hair with warm brown highlights, wears a form-fitting ivory ruched midi dress, light beige trench coat draped open, pale wide-brim hat, black gloves, pearl earrings, and a delicate necklace, and carries one structured black handbag with a small gold chain charm in her right hand. The scene contains exactly one train on the left, arriving or passing with two bright round headlights and glowing destination text; exactly two background commuters on the right side, one suited figure partly cropped in the foreground and one smaller figure farther back; and exactly two illuminated overhead signs, a large red neon sign cropped at the top reading A Trai and a smaller orange advertisement sign beneath it with mostly unreadable stylized lettering and a circular portrait icon. Use a low-angle three-quarter composition emphasizing the woman's full-body silhouette and flowing coat, glossy tiled floor reflections, motion blur on the train, dark overhead cables, cinematic rim lighting, warm station lights against deep blue-black shadows, highly detailed manga linework, polished digital painting, urban noir atmosphere, sharp clothing folds, elegant high-fashion mood, portrait 9:16 aspect ratio.
